hooks.command: cd /home/user/Streaming && BRANCH=claude/hebrew-iptv-player-szWb2 && if ! git diff --quiet || ! git diff --cached --quiet || [ -n "$(git ls-files --others --exclude-standard 2>/dev/null)" ]; then git add . && git commit -m 'auto-commit: session changes' && git push -u origin "$BRANCH"; fi 2>/dev/null || true
